summary: Completed frontend testing of light mode fixes for Ri'DN Partner Dashboard. All 10 features tested and verified working correctly. Background colors on Slot Manager, Users, and Support pages now show white/light (rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)) in light mode. Text visibility verified across all pages with proper contrast (rgb(17, 24, 39) dark text on light backgrounds). Notification bell icon correctly displays dark gray (rgb(55, 65, 81)) in light mode.
critical_code_review_comments: Light mode fix correctly implemented using bg-white/90 dark:bg-white/5 pattern
Text colors properly use gray-900 dark:text-white pattern for visibility
NotificationsPanel.js correctly uses useTheme() context for theme-aware styling
All pages consistently use the glassmorphism pattern with backdrop-blur-xl

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend testing skipped as requested

seed_data_creation: Data was pre-seeded - 30 outlets, 120 bookings, 10 services, 3 users available
context_for_next_testing_agent: All light mode fixes verified working. The bg-white/90 dark:bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl pattern is correctly applied to SlotManagement.js, Users.js, and Support.js pages. Text visibility confirmed across Dashboard, Bookings, Outlets, Services, Finance, Reports, Users, Support, and Slot Management pages.

notification_bell_icon.light_mode: PASS - rgb(55, 65, 81) dark gray icon visible on light background

theme_toggle.dark_to_light: PASS - Successfully switches from Dark Mode to Light Mode
